compartments.label: NEURONS
compartments.snippet: Gray shaded oval/cluster in Panel E containing neuron nodes ADF, AWB, URX, RIC.

compartments.label: ADF
compartments.snippet: Blue triangle node inside NEURONS compartment in Panel E; labeled with tph-1 above.

compartments.label: AWB
compartments.snippet: Green triangle node inside NEURONS compartment in Panel E; labeled with ser-6 above.

compartments.label: URX
compartments.snippet: Yellow hexagon node inside NEURONS compartment in Panel E; labeled with mod-1 above; small black dots around it suggesting secreted molecules.

compartments.label: RIC
compartments.snippet: Red hexagon node inside NEURONS compartment in Panel E; labeled with tbh-1 above; small black dots around it.

compartments.label: INTESTINE
compartments.snippet: Green box on the right side of Panel E diagram; contains nhr-76 → ATGL → β-oxidation / Fat loss pathway.

genes.snippet: Labeled above the ADF blue triangle in Panel E NEURONS compartment; also tested in Panels A and B as a mutant affecting atgl-1 expression.
Labeled above the AWB green triangle in Panel E NEURONS compartment.
Labeled above the URX yellow hexagon in Panel E NEURONS compartment; also used in transgene Pflp-8::mod-1SAS in Panels C and D.
Labeled above the RIC red hexagon in Panel E NEURONS compartment.
First node inside the INTESTINE green box in Panel E; has a solid pointed arrow to ATGL.
Second node inside the INTESTINE green box in Panel E; downstream of nhr-76, upstream of β-oxidation / Fat loss.

tentative_edges.snippet: Solid pointed arrow from ADF (tph-1) to URX (mod-1) labeled '5-HT' in Panel E neuron cluster.
Solid pointed arrow from AWB (ser-6) to ADF (tph-1) in Panel E neuron cluster; arrowhead at ADF. [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
Solid pointed arrow from RIC (tbh-1) to AWB (ser-6) labeled 'Oct' in Panel E neuron cluster; arrowhead at AWB.
Dashed arrow from URX (mod-1) to RIC (tbh-1) in Panel E neuron cluster; dashed line indicates indirect or modulatory signal.
Dashed arrow from URX to INTESTINE labeled 'endocrine signal' in Panel E; pointed arrowhead at INTESTINE.
Solid pointed arrow from nhr-76 to ATGL inside the INTESTINE green box in Panel E.

tentative_edges.relation: ATGL positively regulates beta-oxidation / fat loss
tentative_edges.snippet: Solid pointed arrow from ATGL to 'β-oxidation / Fat loss' inside the INTESTINE green box in Panel E; terminal process node, not a gene.
